const sourceCodesBase64 = {
    'exercise-1': '',
    'exercise-2': '',
    'exercise-3': '',
    'exercise-4': '',
    'exercise-5': '',
    'exercise-6': '',
    'project': '',
};
const sourceCodes = {};
for (const key in sourceCodesBase64) { sourceCodes[key] = decodeURIComponent(escape(window.atob(sourceCodesBase64[key]))); }
